task: Resolve RES-8 by adding a Study readiness and evidence state summary to the ResearchOps Study page.

skippedBundles.reason: No Worker, binding, runtime or deployment implementation changed.

implementationSummary: Added an Evidence state summary GOV.UK summary-list panel to the Study page.
Loaded captured evidence notes from /api/synthesis/evidence and synthesis clusters/themes from /api/synthesis.
Mapped evidence progress into No evidence captured, Evidence captured, Clusters drafted and Themes available states.
Updated the Study analysis task status and hint from evidence state.
Extended tests/study-page-route-state.test.js for markup, controller and CSS hooks.

validation.command: npm run build:generated-css && npm run build:govuk-pages
validation.evidence: Generated CSS and static GOV.UK pages were rebuilt.
Focused Study page route-state regression passed.

validation.command: npx prettier -c public/js/study-page.js src/styles/study-page.scss tests/study-page-route-state.test.js public/pages/study/index.html public/css/study-page.css

validation.evidence: No ESLint errors; public/js/study-page.js retains existing console warnings.
Evidence summary rendered 2 evidence notes, 1 cluster, 1 theme and synthesis status Ready.

validation.command: Playwright mobile mocked route check at 390px
validation.evidence: Evidence summary width was 360px with no horizontal scroll.
Next action rendered Capture session evidence before starting synthesis.
Full test suite passed: 257 tests, 257 pass.
Repository-wide prettier -c . failed because untracked skills/github/github-diamond-standard/references/upstream-bundle contains 113 format warnings; changed-file Prettier and ESLint checks passed.

residualRisks: Linear page required login, so ticket detail was inferred from local Dispatch chat, cron evidence and existing Study implementation.
No new backend readiness endpoint was added; the UI uses existing synthesis endpoints and falls back to empty evidence state if calls fail.
